response.justification: Candidate has well over the required 6+ years of fullstack experience with strong overlap on TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes, and Git. Direct AI-agent / MCP infrastructure work at re:cinq matches a key requirement, and a deep TDD/testing background plus Java exposure align with the stack. Main gaps are no explicit Nest.js or Vitest mentions, but the breadth and depth of relevant work make this a clear interview.
strengths: 15+ years fullstack across TS/Node, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/K8s
Hands-on AI agent and MCP code-generator work at re:cinq
Strong TDD/testing culture: workshops, Selenium course, trunk-based delivery
concerns: No explicit Vitest/Jest framework mention despite testing focus
Significant career investment in DLang, which is outside the target stack
